creator: beefa@goats.org.au
text:
utmp file corrupting itself, seem to be when i start X, if i remove and touch utmp, problem goes away for a while but then comes back
[root@foetus:~] w
w: /dev//root: No such file or directory 
who prints garbage 
[root@foetus:~] who
root             ttyv0   Feb 27 13:19
:0.0             root    Jan  1 08:00   (%Mö4ttyp1)

How-To-Repeat: corrupt utmp
